Businesses that both receive and send goods will need CourierHubb's services, it is compleltly free for them to sign up so you are not actually selling anything; purely making an introduction and helping them sign up.<br><br>This is a <strong>commissionâonly role</strong> with <strong>15% commission</strong> paid on every new client you sign up who then starts to book deliverers through the platform.
